name: الرَّحمَٰن
desc: He who wills goodness and mercy for all His creatures

name: الرَّحِيم
desc: He who acts with extreme kindness

name: المَلِك
desc: The Sovereign Lord, The One with the complete Dominion, the One Whose Dominion is clear from imperfection

name: القُدُّوس
desc: The one who is pure, so far removed of any imperfection. He has no shortcomings, evil is not attributed to Him.

name: السَّلَام
desc: The One who is free from every imperfection, granting peace and safety to His creation. It is because He is free of any defect that one who is with Him experiences tranquility.

name: المُؤمِن
desc: The One who witnessed for Himself that no one is God but Him. And He witnessed for His believers that they are truthful in their belief that no one is God but Him

name: المُهَيمِن
desc: The One who witnesses the saying and deeds of His creatures.

name: العَزِيز
desc: The Strong, The Defeater who is not defeated

name: الجَبَّار
desc: The One that nothing happens in His Dominion except that which He willed

name: المُتَكَبِّر
desc: The One who is clear from the attributes of the creatures and from resembling them.

name: الخَٰلِق
desc: The One who brings everything from non-existence to existence

name: البَارِئ
desc: The Maker, The Creator who has the Power to turn the entities.

name: المُصَوِّر
desc: The One who forms His creatures in different pictures.

name: الغَفَّار
desc: The Forgiver, The One who forgives the sins of His slaves time and time again.

name: القَهَّار
desc: The Dominant, The One who has the perfect Power and is not unable over anything.

name: الوَهَّاب
desc: The One who is Generous in giving plenty without any return. He is everything that benefits whether Halal or Haram.

name: الرَّزَّاق
desc: The Sustainer, The Provider.

name: الفَتَّاح
desc: The Solver, The Reliever, The Judge, The One who opens for His slaves the closed worldly and religious matters.

name: العَلِيم
desc: The Knowledgeable; The One nothing is absent from His knowledge

name: القَابِض
desc: The Constrictor, The Withholder, The One who constricts the sustenance by His wisdom and expands and widens it with His Generosity and Mercy.

name: البَاسِط
desc: The Englarger, The One who constricts the sustenance by His wisdom and expands and widens it with His Generosity and Mercy.

name: الخَافِض
desc: The Abaser, The One who lowers whoever He willed by His Destruction and raises whoever He willed by His Endowment.

name: الرَّافِع
desc: The Exalter, The Elevator, The One who lowers whoever He willed by His Destruction and raises whoever He willed by His Endowment.

name: المُعِزّ
desc: He gives esteem to whoever He willed, hence there is no one to degrade Him; And He degrades whoever He willed, hence there is no one to give Him esteem.

name: المُذِلّ
desc: The Dishonourer, The Humiliator, He gives esteem to whoever He willed, hence there is no one to degrade Him; And He degrades whoever He willed, hence there is no one to give Him esteem.

name: السَّمِيع
desc: The Hearer, The One who Hears all things that are heard by His Eternal Hearing without an ear, instrument or organ.

name: البَصِير
desc: The All-Noticing, The One who Sees all things that are seen by His Eternal Seeing without a pupil or any other instrument.

name: الحَكَم
desc: The Judge, He is the Ruler andThe Judge, He is the Ruler and His judgment is His Word. His judgment is His Word.

name: العَدل
desc: The Just, The One who is entitled to do what He does.

name: اللَّطِيف
desc: The Subtle One, The Gracious, The One who is kind to His slaves and endows upon them.

name: الخَبِير
desc: The One who knows the truth of things.

name: الحَلِيم
desc: The Forebearing, The One who delays the punishment for those who deserve it and then He might forgive them.

name: العَظِيم
desc: The Great One, The Mighty, The One deserving the attributes of Exaltment, Glory, Extolement, and Purity from all imperfection.

name: الغَفُور
desc: The All-Forgiving, The Forgiving, The One who forgives a lot.

name: الشَّكُور
desc: The Grateful, The Appreciative, The One who gives a lot of reward for a little obedience.

name: العَلِيّ
desc: The Most High, The One who is clear from the attributes of the creatures.

name: الكَبِير
desc: The Most Great, The Great, The One who is greater than everything in status.

name: الحَفِيظ
desc: The Preserver, The Protector, The One who protects whatever and whoever He willed to protect.

name: المُقِيت
desc: The Maintainer, The Guardian, The Feeder, The One who has the Power.

name: الحَسِيب
desc: The Reckoner, The One who gives the satisfaction.

name: الجَلِيل
desc: The Sublime One, The Beneficent, The One who is attributed with greatness of Power and Glory of status.

name: الكَرِيم
desc: The Generous One, The Gracious, The One who is attributed with greatness of Power and Glory of status.

name: الرَّقِيب
desc: The Watcher, The One that nothing is absent from Him. Hence, it’s meaning is related to attribute of Knowledge.

name: المُجِيب
desc: The Responsive, The Hearkener, The One who answers the one in need if he asks Him and rescues the yearned if he calls upon Him.

name: الوَاسِع
desc: The Vast, The All-Embracing, The Knowledgeable.

name: الحَكِيم
desc: The Wise, The Judge of Judges, The One who is correct in His doings.

name: الوَدُود
desc: The Most Loving, The Most Affectionate, The Beloved

name: المَجِيد
desc: The Most Glorious One, The One who is with perfect Power, High Status, Compassion, Generosity and Kindness.

name: البَاعِث
desc: The Awakener, The Resurrector, The Arouser

name: الشَّهِيد
desc: The Witness, The One who nothing is absent from Him.

name: الحَقّ
desc: The Truth, The True, The One who truly exists.

name: الوَكِيل
desc: The Trustee, The One who gives the satisfaction and is relied upon.

name: القَوِيّ
desc: The Most Strong, The Strong, The One with the complete Power.

name: المَتِين
desc: The One with extreme Power which is un-interrupted and He does not get tired.

name: الوَلِيّ
desc: The Protecting Friend, The Supporter.

name: الحَمِيد
desc: The Praiseworthy, The praised One who deserves to be praised.

name: المُحصِي
desc: The Counter, The Reckoner, The One who the count of things are known to him.

name: المُبدِئ
desc: The One who started the human being. That is, He created him.

name: المُعِيد
desc: The Reproducer, The One who brings back the creatures after death.

name: المُحيِي
desc: The Restorer, The Giver of Life.

name: المُمِيت
desc: The Creator of Death, The Destroyer, The One who renders the living dead.

name: الحَيّ
desc: The Alive, The One attributed with a life that is unlike our life and is not that of a combination of soul, flesh or blood.

name: القَيُّوم
desc: The Self-Subsisting, The Self-Existing One upon Whom all others depend

name: الوَاجِد
desc: The Perceiver, The Finder, The Rich who is never poor. Al-Wajid is Richness.

name: المَاجِد
desc: The Glorious, He who is Most Glorious.

name: الوَاحِد
desc: The Unique, The One, The One without a partner.

name: الأَحَد
desc: The One.

name: الصَّمَد
desc: The Eternal, The Independent, The Master who is relied upon in matters and reverted to in ones needs. He is the only one a person should turn to when feeling helpless.

name: القَادِر
desc: The Able, The Capable, The One attributed with Power.

name: المُقتَدِر
desc: The Powerful, The Dominant, The One with the perfect Power that nothing is withheld from Him.

name: المُقَدِّم
desc: The Expediter, The Promoter, The One who puts things in their right places.

name: المُؤَخِّر
desc: The Postponer, He Who Puts Far Away. He makes ahead what He wills and delays what He wills.

name: الأَوَّل
desc: The First, The One whose Existence is without a beginning.

name: الآخِر
desc: The Last, The One whose Existence is without an end.

name: الظَّاهِر
desc: The Manifest, The Conspicuous, The Evident

name: البَاطِن
desc: The Hidden, The Secret One, The Inner One, The Knower of Hidden Things

name: الوَالِي
desc: The Governor, The One who owns things and manages them.

name: المُتَعَالِي
desc: The Most Exalted, The High Exalted, The One who is clear from the attributes of the creation.

name: البَرّ
desc: The Source of All Goodness, The Righteous, The One who is kind to His creatures

name: التَّوَاب
desc: The Acceptor of Repentance, The Oft-Forgiving, The Acceptor of our Return

name: المُنتَقِم
desc: The Avenger, The Disapprover, The Inflictor of Retribution

name: العَفُوّ
desc: The Pardoner, The Forgiver and The Eliminator of Sins.

name: الرَّءُوف
desc: The Most Kind, The Tenderly Merciful, The Clement and Compassionate

name: مَالِكُ المُلك
desc: The One who controls the Dominion and gives dominion to whoever He willed.

name: ذُو الجَلَالِ وَالإِكرَام
meaning: The Possessor of Majesty and Honour
desc: The Lord of Majesty and Bounty.

name: المُقسِط
desc: The Equitable, The One who is Just in His judgment.

name: الجَامِع
desc: The Gatherer, The One who gathers the creatures on a day that there is no doubt about, that is the Day of Judgment.

name: الغَنِيّ
desc: The One who does not need the creation.

name: المُغنِي
desc: The Emancipator, The Fulfiller of Needs, The Bestower of Wealth.

name: المَانِع
desc: The Withholder.

name: الضَّارّ
desc: The Correcter, The Balancer, The Distresser, The Afflicter, The Punisher.

name: النَّافِع
desc: The Creator of Good, The Benefiter, The Propitious, The Auspicious

name: النُّور
desc: The Light, The One who guides.

name: الهَادِي
desc: The Guide, The Leader, The Guide of the Right Path

name: البَدِيع
desc: The Wonderful Originator, The Unprecedented and Incomparable Inventor

name: البَاقِي
desc: The Everlasting, The Ever-Enduring, The Ever-Present

name: الوَارِث
desc: The Heir, The One whose Existence remains.

name: الرَّشِيد
meaning: The Guide to Path of Rectitude
desc: The Guide to the Right Path, The One who guides.
otherNames: The Guide to the Right Path

name: الصَّبُور
desc: The Patient, The One who does not quickly punish the sinners.
